target.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, model || ' ' || status || ': ' || coalesce(error,'') AS text, status AS tags FROM predictions WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND status <> 'ok'

panels.title: Expected cooling hours (next 24 h at prediction time) — LLM vs degree-day baseline

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, model || ' (' || kind || ')' AS metric, (prediction->>'expected_cooling_hours')::float AS hours FROM predictions WHERE status = 'ok' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Expected heating hours — LLM vs baseline

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, model || ' (' || kind || ')' AS metric, (prediction->>'expected_heating_hours')::float AS hours FROM predictions WHERE status = 'ok' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Actual daily on-hours (from CT-485 cycle events)

targets.rawSql: WITH e AS (SELECT ts, kind, detail->>'cmd' AS cmd, lead(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY detail->>'cmd' ORDER BY ts) AS nts, lead(kind) OVER (PARTITION BY detail->>'cmd' ORDER BY ts) AS nkind FROM events WHERE kind IN ('cycle_start','cycle_stop') AND $__timeFilter(ts)) SELECT time_bucket('1 day', ts) AS time, cmd AS metric, round((sum(extract(epoch FROM nts - ts)) / 3600)::numeric, 2)::float AS hours FROM e WHERE kind = 'cycle_start' AND nkind = 'cycle_stop' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ts, model, kind, status, prediction->>'expected_cooling_hours' AS "cool h", prediction->>'expected_heating_hours' AS "heat h", prediction->>'peak_window' AS "peak", prediction->>'confidence' AS "conf", coalesce(recommendation, error) AS recommendation FROM predictions WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100
